content:
📜 Why This Works:
✔ Adds character-based strategy.
✔ Ensures varied gameplay—no two archetypes feel the same.
✔ Balances risk and reward mechanics.

📜 2. Professor Buffs, Debuffs, and Setting Modifiers

📜 The professor’s abilities are also affected by setting and exposition mechanics.

✔ Each professor role rolls a die at the start of class.
✔ The setting (day vs. night) may buff or debuff their power.
✔ Students influence the weekly leader selection process.

📖 Example: Setting-Based Buffs & Debuffs
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 383 (chunk 383/555)
